prompt: A highly detailed sci-fi illustration of a {argument name="robot style" default="cute chibi robot"} floating in space, {argument name="action" default="welding a massive metallic megastructure"}. The robot has a large round head with {argument name="eye color" default="glowing blue"} eyes and a white and black mechanical body. It is holding a tool that emits bright orange sparks against the framework. The megastructure is enormous, curving through the scene, built as a {argument name="structure type" default="dark metal lattice covered in thousands of tiny glowing yellow lights"}. In the background, a {argument name="star color" default="brilliant glowing blue"} star shines brightly against a deep space backdrop filled with stars and cosmic dust. The image features hyper-detailed textures, cinematic lighting, high contrast, and a dense, intricate mechanical design.
translatedPrompt: 一张高度精细的科幻插图，画面中是一个 {argument name="robot style" default="可爱的 Q 版机器人"} 漂浮在太空中，正在 {argument name="action" default="焊接一个巨大的金属巨型结构"}。该机器人拥有一个圆圆的大脑袋，配有 {argument name="eye color" default="发光的蓝色"} 眼睛，身体为黑白相间的机械结构。它手中拿着的工具在框架上迸发出明亮的橙色火花。这个巨型结构极其宏大，在场景中蜿蜒延伸，呈现为 {argument name="structure type" default="覆盖着数千个微小黄色亮点的深色金属网格"}。背景中，一颗 {argument name="star color" default="璀璨发光的蓝色"} 恒星在布满繁星和宇宙尘埃的深空背景下熠熠生辉。该图像具有超精细的纹理、电影级的灯光效果、高对比度以及密集而复杂的机械设计。

breakdown.creativeCore: 科幻 Q 版机器人太空焊接场景：生成一张高度精细的电影级科幻场景，描绘了一个小机器人在星空背景下修复大型太空结构的过程。
breakdown.subject: 界面
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, sci-fi]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: high contrast]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
